assertionDescription: CONTRIBUTING.md exists with accurate branch protection and merge requirements
testProcedure: 1. Verified CONTRIBUTING.md exists and is readable
2. Confirmed CONTRIBUTING.md contains accurate branch protection settings:
- Dismiss stale reviews when new commits are pushed
- Require branches to be up to date before merging
- pre-commit: npm run typecheck and npm test
7. Verified CI/CD pipeline documentation matches actual workflow
observations: Branch Protection section clearly documents all required GitHub settings
Status checks (secret-scan, quick-checks, full-checks) are documented
Local development hooks are explained with their purposes
CI/CD pipeline section explains the three-tier check system
Preventing Future Merge Issues section provides helpful guidance
Verified workflow file contains secret-scan, quick-checks, and full-checks jobs
Contributing guidelines are product-focused (preserves security model, understandable code)
Accepted contributions are clearly defined (bug fixes, security fixes, farm-assistant features, docs)
Contributions to avoid are specified (platform/framework work without user value)

branchProtectionSettings: Require status checks: secret-scan, quick-checks, full-checks
Branches up to date before merging
workflowChecksVerified: full-checks depends on secret-scan and quick-checks

reasoning: CONTRIBUTING.md exists with comprehensive and accurate branch protection documentation. All required status checks (secret-scan, quick-checks, full-checks) are documented and match the actual GitHub Actions workflow (.github/workflows/release-readiness.yml). Local development hooks are explained. Merge requirements are clear and appropriate for OSS project governance.
